Catalog/Cardiovascular/MyClip TEER System Accessories Kit
❤️ CardiovascularREF: MRL-CV-004

MyClip TEER System Accessories Kit

MyClip TEER System · Surgical Instruments

Complete accessory kit including ground plate, podium, anti-skid silicone mat, and bracket for optimal procedural setup. Provides stability and precise positioning during TEER procedures.

MaterialMixed materials (Silicone, Metal)
Frequently Asked Questions

Complete accessory kit including ground plate, podium, anti-skid silicone mat, and bracket for optimal procedural setup. Provides stability and precise positioning during TEER procedures.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MyClip TEER System Accessories Kit, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MyClip TEER System Accessories Kit is constructed using Mixed materials (Silicone, Metal), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
